_readme: v7 + QA 전수 타이밍 검증 확정
title: Here's what we're gonna do

sentences.en: Which we don't even sell, so that is a bit of a mystery.
sentences.ko: 저희가 팔지도 않는 색이라, 좀 미스터리네요.

sentences.en: ★ Okay, here's what we're gonna do about this.
I am gonna call the vendor and have this fixed today.
sentences.ko: 제가 업체에 전화해서 오늘 안에 해결하겠습니다.

sentences.en: I will personally see the dresses before they are Fedexed.
sentences.ko: 발송 전에 제가 직접 드레스를 확인하겠습니다.

sentences.en: And I promise you they will be at your front door by 9:00 A.M. Friday, okay?
sentences.ko: 금요일 아침 9시까지 댁 앞에 도착하도록 약속드릴게요.
